Blizzard revealed latest Overwatch animated short Gamescom, focused Mei, ice-wielding climatologist.

Even though game doesn't have story mode, Blizzard does impeccable providing heroes with rich sometimes emotional background form these animated shorts, quality top-notch, easily comparable something made studio like Pixar.
There's also other material that gives glimpse into Overwatch lore, like comics, character interactions even Easter eggs found across maps.
